class.name: FabricSnapshot
class.brief_description: Godot Resource holding a complete fabric entity state dump.
class.description: FabricSnapshot stores entity state as parallel packed arrays for efficient binary serialization. Zone 0 writes a snapshot during graceful shutdown (drain consolidation) and reloads it on restart to redistribute entities across a potentially different zone topology. Saved as [code].res[/code] with [constant ResourceSaver.FLAG_COMPRESS] (zstd). The [member version] field allows loaders to reject incompatible layouts. Array layout per entity [code]i[/code]: [codeblock] global_ids[i] -- entity global ID positions[i*3 .. i*3+2] -- cx, cy, cz (meters, f64) velocities[i*3 .. i*3+2] -- vx, vy, vz (m/s, f64) accelerations[i*3 .. i*3+2] -- ax, ay, az (m/s^2, f64) payloads[i*14 .. i*14+13] -- 14 u32 payload words [/codeblock]

method.name: get_entity_count
method.description: Returns the number of entities stored, equal to the length of [member global_ids].

members.member: Interleaved [code]ax, ay, az[/code] per entity. Length equals entity count times 3.
Per-entity global IDs. Length equals the entity count.
14 payload words per entity, interleaved. Length equals entity count times 14. See [FabricZone] for the payload word layout.
Interleaved [code]cx, cy, cz[/code] per entity (meters). Length equals entity count times 3.
Interleaved [code]vx, vy, vz[/code] per entity. Length equals entity count times 3.
Format version. Currently [code]1[/code]. Loaders reject snapshots whose version they do not recognize.
